title: Refactor test/apiv2/rest_api/test_rest_v2_0_0.py
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/test/apiv2/rest_api/test_rest_v2_0_0.py  has become unwieldy making backports and maintenance difficult.

**Describe the results you expected:**

The areas of concern, for example: images, containers vs pods, should be moved to other files. The system endpoints should be left in test/apiv2/rest_api/test_rest_v2_0_0.py. Some items, like `PODMAN_URL` and `_url`, which may be needed across concerns should be moved into `__init__.py` and imported as needed.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
@jwhonce Any movement on this?  Would the work on podman-py effect this?
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
